---
title: "CPRD STudy 1"
---
# Heading 1

***

## Heading 2

This is a **test**
This is *italic test*

This is a **test**

This is *italic test*

---

### Heading 3

#### Heading 4

* Bullet point 1
    * Bullet point level 2
        * Bullet point level 3
* Back to level 1

1. Numbered point 1
    a. Numbered point level 2 
    b. Numbered point level 2 again
2. Back to level 1

* [ ] First task
* [x] Finished task

> Quarto helps me keep my work organised.

[University of Exeter](https://www.exeter.ac.uk/)

<https://www.exeter.ac.uk/>

| Letter | Number |
| - | - |
| A | 1 |
| B | 2 |
| C | 3 |
